'''Carvanium''' was a metal used in alloys, including [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]]. [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null ARC]] [[Prudii Skirata|Null-5]] sabotaged [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factories by adding 5% extra carvanium to the droid recipes. This resulted in crumbling droids which could easily be destroyed by a single shot of any weapon.
